dictator.label: Dictator
dictator.description: Said by a dictator or authoritarian leader

techbro.label: Tech Bro
techbro.description: Said by a tech billionaire or Silicon Valley exec

questions.quote: Move fast and break things.
questions.hint: Facebook's early internal motto

questions.quote: If you're not a liberal when you're 25, you have no heart. If you're not a conservative by 35, you have no brain.
questions.attribution: Often misattributed, but popularized by authoritarian-adjacent figures
questions.hint: A classic misquote used to justify shifting politics

questions.quote: Competition is for losers.
questions.hint: Billionaire PayPal co-founder and venture capitalist

questions.quote: It is enough that the people know there was an election. The people who cast the votes decide nothing. The people who count the votes decide everything.
questions.hint: Soviet leader responsible for the deaths of millions

questions.quote: I could either watch it happen or be a part of it.
questions.hint: World's richest person, owner of X (formerly Twitter)

questions.quote: The death of one man is a tragedy. The death of millions is a statistic.
questions.hint: Soviet dictator who ruled the USSR from 1924–1953

questions.quote: The best minds of my generation are thinking about how to make people click ads.
questions.hint: A lament from inside Silicon Valley

questions.quote: If you want to know who controls you, look at who you are not allowed to criticize.
questions.attribution: Often misattributed to Voltaire, actually from white nationalist Kevin Strom
questions.hint: A quote often weaponized by authoritarian movements

questions.quote: Your margin is my opportunity.
questions.hint: Amazon founder and Blue Origin CEO

questions.quote: Ideas are more powerful than guns. We would not let our enemies have guns, why should we let them have ideas?
questions.hint: Soviet dictator known for mass censorship and purges

questions.quote: We are a nation of laws, but we're also a nation of humans.
questions.hint: Meta CEO defending policy decisions

questions.quote: He who controls the media controls the minds of the public.
questions.attribution: Noam Chomsky, though often co-opted by authoritarian figures
questions.hint: Describes propaganda techniques used by authoritarian regimes

questions.quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
questions.attribution: Alan Kay (often quoted by tech founders)
questions.hint: A favorite Silicon Valley maxim

questions.quote: We will bury you.
questions.hint: Soviet Premier who faced off against the US during the Cold War

questions.quote: We want to give everyone in the world the best education for free.
questions.hint: Tech altruism that critics called digital colonialism

questions.quote: One death is a tragedy; a million deaths is a statistic. When one man is robbed of a loaf of bread, it is a theft. When millions are robbed of their dignity, it is policy.
questions.hint: Reflects the dehumanizing logic of mass authoritarian rule

questions.quote: I think it's very important to have a feedback loop, where you're constantly thinking about what you've done and how you could be doing it better.
questions.hint: The world's richest man, speaking about iteration

questions.quote: Print is the sharpest and the strongest weapon of our party.
questions.hint: Soviet dictator on controlling the press

questions.quote: We're all just temporarily embarrassed billionaires.
questions.attribution: Paraphrase of John Steinbeck, adopted as a Silicon Valley attitude
questions.hint: The ethos behind hustle culture and startup mythology

questions.quote: Don't interfere with anything in the Constitution. That must be maintained, for it is the only safeguard of our liberties.
questions.attribution: Abraham Lincoln (often misused by authoritarian populists)
questions.hint: A quote weaponized out of context by those who undermine institutions

questions.quote: People don't want to buy a quarter-inch drill. They want a quarter-inch hole.
questions.attribution: Theodore Levitt, endlessly quoted in product circles
questions.hint: The mantra of product-market fit obsessives

questions.quote: Education is a weapon whose effects depend on who holds it in his hands and at whom it is aimed.
questions.hint: Soviet leader who controlled all Soviet education

questions.quote: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
questions.hint: Meta CEO's philosophy on bold moves

questions.quote: To choose one's victims, to prepare one's plan minutely, to slake an implacable vengeance, and then to go to bed. There is nothing sweeter in the world.
questions.hint: Soviet dictator describing his approach to political enemies

questions.quote: Insanely great.
questions.hint: Apple co-founder's favorite product superlative

questions.quote: A single death is a tragedy; a million deaths is a statistic.
questions.hint: Soviet leader responsible for millions of deaths through purges and famine

questions.quote: Disrupt or be disrupted.
questions.hint: The rallying cry of startup culture

questions.quote: Gratitude is a sickness suffered by dogs.
questions.hint: Soviet dictator notorious for purging loyal allies

questions.quote: We have to go from a world where to get the most powerful computers we have to use the internet, to one where the most powerful computers are offline.
questions.hint: AI maximalist and Y Combinator alumni

questions.quote: No amount of cajolery, and no attempts at ethical or social seduction, can eradicate from my heart a deep burning hatred for the Tory Party. So far as I am concerned they are lower than vermin.
questions.hint: Passionate rhetoric that sounds authoritarian but came from a democratic socialist

questions.quote: I think we have a duty to maintain the light of consciousness to make sure it continues into the future.
questions.hint: SpaceX and Tesla CEO with grand visions for humanity's future

questions.quote: I know that we made mistakes.
questions.hint: Theranos founder convicted of fraud

questions.quote: Liberty is a duty, not a right.
questions.hint: Italian fascist dictator who ruled from 1922–1943

questions.quote: I would never read a book... I'm very skeptical of books.
questions.hint: FTX founder convicted of massive crypto fraud

questions.quote: Lincoln was a man who created himself from nothing without any help from outside or other people. I see certain similarities between him and me.
questions.hint: Libyan dictator who ruled for over 40 years

questions.quote: I call on you not to hate, because hate does not leave space for a person to be fair and it makes you blind and closes all doors of thinking.
questions.hint: Iraqi dictator who ruled through terror for over two decades

questions.quote: We understand the great arc of human history bends towards people coming together in ever greater numbers — from tribes to cities to nations — to achieve things we couldn't on our own.
questions.hint: Meta CEO speaking about the power of connection

questions.quote: I was only an aspiring dictator. I was never a real dictator.
questions.hint: Chilean military dictator who seized power in a 1973 coup

questions.quote: We will make the impossible possible.
questions.hint: Chinese communist leader whose policies led to millions of deaths

questions.quote: History will absolve me.
questions.hint: Cuban revolutionary who ruled for nearly 50 years

questions.quote: The press is the enemy of the people.
questions.hint: Soviet dictator who suppressed all press freedom
